DocumentationExampleCode.Code: meta-data-quality from-transform-workspace --transform-workspace .\Transforms.Workspace --binding-workspace .\Binding.Workspace --new-workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace meta-data-quality inspect --workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace meta-data-quality promote --workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace --all meta-convert data-quality-to-sql --workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace --out .\DataQuality.sql
